name: studio-design/openapi-contract-testing
description: Framework-agnostic OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 contract testing for PHPUnit with endpoint coverage tracking

suggest.illuminate/testing: Required for the Laravel adapter (ValidatesOpenApiSchema trait)
suggest.symfony/yaml: Required to load OpenAPI specs directly from .yaml / .yml files
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: A PSR-18 HTTP client implementation for resolving external HTTP(S) $refs
suggest.symfony/http-client: A PSR-18 HTTP client implementation for resolving external HTTP(S) $refs
suggest.fakerphp/faker: Improves the realism of inputs generated by ExploresOpenApiEndpoint (email, uuid, urls). The fuzzer falls back to deterministic primitives when not installed.
suggest.pestphp/pest: Activates the Pest expectation API (toMatchOpenApiResponseSchema / toMatchOpenApiRequestSchema). Library runtime stays Pest-free; the plugin auto-loads only when Pest is installed.

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full PHPUnit test suite.
scripts-descriptions.test:pest: Run the Pest plugin test suite (requires `composer require --dev pestphp/pest:^3.0`).
scripts-descriptions.cs: Run PHP-CS-Fixer in fix mode (rewrites files).
scripts-descriptions.cs-check: Run PHP-CS-Fixer in dry-run mode (CI gate).
scripts-descriptions.ci: Run the same checks the CI matrix runs.
